title: Plain Grinder
description: Grind ores to dust and double your output
body:
Grind up ores into dust and smelt it!

 

 

Place the grinder with the handle on top

As seen below, put in ore and use the grinder with your empty hand

Then the dust is smelted in a furnace

Full compatibility with JEI for grinding recipes https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei

 

As of Minecraft 1.20, there is an automatic handle that spins by itself, and the manual handle that needs a player or auto clicker/user

Customize the recipes in a data pack
https://github.com/Lothrazar/PlainGrinder/tree/trunk/1.16/src/main/resources/data/plaingrinder/recipes

New versions have CraftTweaker support here are some [examples](https://github.com/Lothrazar/PlainGrinder/tree/trunk/1.20.1/examples)

 

 

Example Config file to change lots of things see [plaingrinder.toml](https://github.com/Lothrazar/PlainGrinder/tree/trunk/1.20.1/examples)



![How to use](https://imgur.com/9C5g5Pm.gif)
